tasks.prompt:
Hand-drawn children's book illustration in loose expressive black ink sketch style with delicate cross-hatching shading for volume and texture, simple cute cartoon characters with big eyes and minimal clean details, clean white paper background with subtle ground texture, generous negative space, emotional nostalgic atmosphere, highly consistent character design throughout the entire series.

Art style rules (must follow strictly):
- Loose black ink lines with natural hand-drawn wobble
- Cross-hatching shading on clothes, ground, and objects for depth
- Selective warm color accents only on key elements (avoid flat unshaded colors)
- Soft natural lighting with gentle highlights on surfaces
- Warm heartfelt and nostalgic atmosphere
- In the exact same art style across all images in the series
- Generous negative space, never cluttered composition

Negative prompt: realistic, photorealistic, 3d render, blurry, deformed hands, extra limbs, text in image, watermark, low quality, flat unshaded color, western disney style, heavy anime look, cluttered composition, modern elements, urban setting, neon colors, digital art look

Character consistency rules:
Azhen: a 24-year-old Chinese woman with a short black bob tucked behind one ear, oval face, expressive dark eyes, cream blouse, rust-red cardigan, calf-length navy skirt, simple brown shoes; she carries a small round metal film can. Aqiang: a 26-year-old Chinese man with short slightly tousled black hair, gentle square face, olive-green work jacket over an off-white shirt, dark trousers, brown shoes. Both are young adults. Keep their facial structure, ages, hair, clothes, proportions and the old wooden cinema booth identical in every scene.

Scene description:
Azhen, a shy young Chinese woman, watches Aqiang from a few steps away beside a quiet old cinema booth at dusk; she holds a small film can close to her chest while he adjusts the wooden door, one clear tender unspoken-love moment, vertical composition, clean upper area, no written text

Output constraints:
- Portrait orientation, consistent framing and visual language across the series
- Keep a clean area for later subtitle compositing
- Do not render captions, letters, logos, signatures, or watermarks inside the image

Execution rules (must follow):
- Generate exactly one vertical 3:4 image for this scene.
- Keep every recurring character, costume, prop, and location consistent with the character rules and shared reference image in this story package.
- Preserve loose black ink lines, cross-hatching, warm off-white paper, muted colors and generous negative space.
- Depict only the requested story beat. Never reuse characters, locations, or props from another story.
- Do not draw subtitles, captions, letters, logos, signatures, or watermarks.
- Preserve generous clean paper space for text added later by the video compositor.
